We value your privacy

We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, serve personalised ads or content, and analyse our traffic. By clicking "Accept All", you consent to our use of cookies. Cookie Policy

Customise Consent Preferences

We use cookies to help you navigate efficiently and perform certain functions. You will find detailed information about all cookies under each consent category below.

The cookies that are categorised as "Necessary" are stored on your browser as they are essential for enabling the basic functionalities of the site.... 

Always Active

Necessary cookies are required to enable the basic features of this site, such as providing secure log-in or adjusting your consent preferences. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable data.

  • Cookie
    AWSALBTG
  • Duration
    7 days
  • Description
    AWS Load Balancer session affinity
     
  • Cookie
    AWSALBTGCORS
  • Duration
    7 days
  • Description
    AWS Load Balancer session affinity
     
  • Cookie
    AWSALBCORS
  • Duration
    7 days
  • Description
    Amazon Web Services set this cookie for load balancing.
  • Cookie
    m
  • Duration
    1 year 1 month 4 days
  • Description
    Stripe sets this cookie for fraud prevention purposes. It identifies the device used to access the website, allowing the website to be formatted accordingly.
  • Cookie
    __stripe_mid
  • Duration
    1 year
  • Description
    Stripe sets this cookie to set a unique session identifier to recognize users across sessions.
  • Cookie
    __stripe_sid
  • Duration
    1 hour
  • Description
    Stripe sets this cookie to set a unique session identifier for a single session.
  • Cookie
    g_state
  • Duration
    6 months
  • Description
    Set by Google as part of the Google Identity Services (Sign-In with Google) integration. This cookie stores the user's interaction state with the Google One Tap sign-in prompt, such as whether the prompt has been dismissed. It is required for the Google SSO login functionality to work properly and does not collect analytics data.
  • Cookie
    _dd_s
  • Duration
    1 year
  • Description
    Set by the Datadog Real User Monitoring (RUM) SDK to track active user sessions. This cookie enables application performance monitoring, error tracking, and service reliability diagnostics. It is essential for maintaining the security, stability, and availability of the service and does not collect data for analytics or advertising purposes.
  • Cookie
    pld_x-pld-tag
  • Duration
    session
  • Description

    This cookie stores an anonymous browser identifier generated locally as a 16-character hash from a timestamp and a random UUID. It is sent in the "x-pld-tag" HTTP header to allow the application to associate API requests from the same browser across login and logout states. No personal data, account information, or device fingerprint is collected.

  • Cookie
    cookieyes-*
  • Duration
    1 year
  • Description
    CookieYes sets this cookie for consent solution management.
  • Cookie
    pld_ut
  • Duration
    1 day
  • Description

    Cookies required for login

  • Cookie
    pld_urt
  • Duration
    300 days
  • Description

    Cookies required for login

  • Cookie
    dd_cookie_test_*
  • Duration
    1 minute
  • Description
    Datadog Real User Monitoring (RUM) Browser SDK sets this cookie as a temporary cookie used to test for cookie support.

Functional cookies help perform certain functionalities like sharing the content of the website on social media platforms, collecting feedback, and other third-party features.

No cookies to display.

These cookies help us understand user behavior and measure the performance of our website, enabling us to improve the overall user experience.

  • Cookie
    _ga
  • Duration
    1 year 1 month 4 days
  • Description
    Google Analytics sets this cookie to calculate visitor, session and campaign data and track site usage for the site's analytics report. The cookie stores information anonymously and assigns a randomly generated number to recognise unique visitors.
  • Cookie
    _ga_*
  • Duration
    1 year 1 month 4 days
  • Description
    Google Analytics sets this cookie to store and count page views.
  • Cookie
    AWSALB
  • Duration
    7 days
  • Description
    AWSALB is an application load balancer cookie set by Amazon Web Services to map the session to the target.
  • Cookie
    ph_phc_Be6wE0Vfi6lsbbfKfl4tgpzqKkB1UG29ddOlSA6B8NW_posthog
  • Duration
    1 year
  • Description
    Set by PostHog, a product analytics platform, to identify unique visitors and track user interactions such as page views, clicks, and feature usage. This cookie assigns a distinct ID to each visitor, enabling aggregated analytics on product performance and user behavior. No advertising or cross-site tracking is performed.

Advertisement cookies are used to provide visitors with customised advertisements based on the pages you visited previously and to analyse the effectiveness of the ad campaigns.

No cookies to display.
